texto: Sometimes, laughing like a lunatic can be the best solution. Or crying loudly into a pillow. But don't regret anything. Always tell yourself "I. Regret. Nothing." because really, no matter how sucky, or crappy your life gets, you really shouldn't regret it. Everything you do makes yourself up, and kid, just do the right thing every now and then, and you'll be good. We. Regret. Nothing.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Victoria Estrada: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Sometimes, laughing like a lunatic can be the best solution. Or crying loudly into a pillow. But …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, inspiracional, vida pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e vida.
